title: briza bidentata
intro: Briza bidentata, also known as two-toothed brome or two-toothed briza, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Briza bidentata include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Briza bidentata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
